zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Griggs於1436年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫頓時，他的父親John Griggs Jr.16歲，母親Margaret Roslin21歲。他於1465年與Rose de Suffolk在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年4月27日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫頓聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Griggs was born in 1436, in Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Griggs Jr., was 16 and his mother, Margaret Roslin, was 21. He married Rose de Suffolk in 1465, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 27 April 1494, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Griggs est né en 1436, à Somerton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Griggs Jr., avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Roslin, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Rose de Suffolk en 1465, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Griggs 1436 in Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Griggs Jr. 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Roslin 21. Er hat 1465 in Suffolk, England Rose de Suffolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. April 1494 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Rose de Suffolk nel 1465, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Griggsが1436年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンで生まれた時，父John Griggs Jr.は16歳，母Margaret Roslinは21歳であった。1465年にイギリススフォルクでRose de Suffolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年4月27日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンスト マルガーエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Margaret's Church, Somerton, Baber: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치
ko.Bury, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Griggs(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Griggs Jr.(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Roslin(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 수폴크에서 Rose de Suffolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 4월 27일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Griggs nasceu em 1436, em Somerton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Griggs Jr., tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Roslin, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose de Suffolk em 1465, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Griggs родился в 1436 г. в местности сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Griggs Jr. было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Roslin, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose de Suffolk в 1465 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 апреля 1494 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Griggs nació en 1436, en Somerton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Griggs Jr., tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Roslin, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rose de Suffolk en 1465, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de abril de 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
